_comment: Hero photo for each page. Edited by the committee via the CMS at /admin → Site settings → Page hero photos. Leave 'image' empty to use the plain text-only hero (no backdrop). Path is /assets/uploads/<filename> for CMS-uploaded photos, or /assets/photos/<filename> for committee-supplied originals.
